name: Santa Fe Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add green peppers and onions; cook until tender crisp.
3. Add salsa, beans, corn, and rice; cook until thoroughly heated.
4. For each serving, place 1 cup lettuce on a serving plate.
5. Surround the lettuce with tortilla chips.
6. Top with warm vegetable mixture.
7. Sprinkle 1/4 cup cheese evenly over each serving.
8. Garnish with sour cream.
Each serving provides:
740 calories
25 g. protein
26.7 g. fat
100.4 g. carbohydrate
7.1 g. dietary fiber
36 mg. cholesterol
896 mg. sodium
Source: "Veg-able Rice"
